title: astragalus sinicus
intro: Astragalus sinicus, also known as the Chinese milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-modulating effects. The health benefits of Astragalus sinicus include reduced stress and anxiety, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Astragalus sinicus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
